title: CSS Variables (Custom Properties) Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential properties for storing and reusing values within your CSS to create maintainable and themeable styles.

questions.question: Which of these is the REQUIRED prefix for defining a CSS variable (Custom Property)?
Which CSS function is used specifically to APPLY a variable's value to a property?
Where is the MOST common place to declare global CSS variables to ensure they are available everywhere?
One of the most powerful use cases for CSS variables is ________ (easily switching between Light and Dark versions of a site).
What is the second value used for inside a 'var(--primary, blue)' function?
options: To set the duration of the transition.
To set a 'fallback' value (blue) in case the variable (--primary) is not defined.
To choose the font for the variable.
To automatically stop the animation halfway.
